zh.lifeSummary: Alix Guigone de Forez於1182年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯洛易蒙特布利森。她於1205年與Archambaud VIII de Bourbon在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1241年10月29日在義大利普格利亞塔朗托卡斯泰拉內塔享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alix Guigone de Forez于1182年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯洛易蒙特布利森。她于1205年与Archambaud VIII de Bourbon在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1241年10月29日在意大利普格利亞塔朗托卡斯泰拉內塔享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Forez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Manuel, Juan, Raul, Carlos, Francisco, Jesus, Jorge, Ramon, Blanca, Miguel.
Spanish (Flórez): probably a patronymic (developed via Fróilaz) from the medieval Visigothic personal name Froila, a derivative of Gothic frauja ‘lord, master’.

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Flores
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Jesus, Manuel, Luis, Francisco, Miguel, Pedro, Raul, Ruben, Roberto.
Spanish: variant of Flórez (see Florez ) under the influence of flores ‘flowers’.

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

nameMeanings.name: Guigone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Corrado, Giovanni, Franco, Marco, Rocco.
Italian: from an augmentative of the personal name   Guido  .

en.lifeSummary: Alix Guigone de Forez was born in 1182, in Montbrison, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. She married Archambaud VIII de Bourbon in 1205, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 29 October 1241, in Castellaneta, Taranto, Puglia, Italy, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Alix Guigone de Forez est née en 1182, à Montbrison, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Elle a épousé Archambaud VIII de Bourbon en 1205, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 octobre 1241, à Castellaneta, Taranto, Puglia, Italie, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alix Guigone de Forez wurde 1182 in Montbrison, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat 1205 in Frankreich Archambaud VIII de Bourbon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Oktober 1241 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Castellaneta, Taranto, Puglia, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Alix Guigone de Forez è nata il nel 1182 nel Montbrison, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Lei sposato Archambaud VIII de Bourbon nel 1205, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 ottobre 1241, nel Castellaneta, Taranto, Puglia, Italia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne,: フランスアウバーグンアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルト
ja.lifeSummary: Alix Guigone de Forezは1182年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスロイアーモントブリソンで生まれた。1205年にフランスでArchambaud VIII de Bourbonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1241年10月29日にイタリアプウグリアターアントーカステランエタで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix Guigone de Forez(은)는 1182년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 로이르 몽브리슨에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1205년 프랑스에서 Archambaud VIII de Bourbon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 10월 29일 이탈리아 푸그리야 태랜토 카스텔랜타에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alix Guigone de Forez nasceu em 1182, em Montbrison, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Ela casou-se com Archambaud VIII de Bourbon em 1205, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1241, em Castellaneta, Taranto, Puglia, Itália, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Alix Guigone de Forez родилась в 1182 г. в местности монтбрисон, лоир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archambaud VIII de Bourbon в 1205 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 29 октября 1241 г. в местности кастелланета, таранто, пугля, Италия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Alix Guigone de Forez nació en 1182, en Montbrison, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Se casó con Archambaud VIII de Bourbon en 1205, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1241, en Castellaneta, Taranto, Puglia, Italia, a la edad de 59 años.
